tagline: Your Social Media, Finally Under Control

scenes.voiceover: Managing social media for your business shouldn't feel like a second job. But between Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn... it's overwhelming.
scenes.visual_description: A stressed small business owner sitting at a desk surrounded by multiple laptops, tablets, and phones, each showing different social media apps. Their face shows frustration as they juggle between platforms. Dark, cluttered workspace with scattered papers.

scenes.voiceover: What if you could manage all your accounts from one simple dashboard? Schedule posts, track analytics, and automate your content... all in one place.
scenes.visual_description: Close-up of hands typing rapidly on keyboard, then gradually slowing down. Transition to a calm, clean desk with a single laptop screen showing ZunoSync dashboard. Bright, organized workspace with natural lighting. Person looks relaxed and confident.

scenes.voiceover: Thousands of small businesses already save hours every week with ZunoSync. More consistency, better engagement, real growth.
scenes.visual_description: Montage of business owners of different ages using ZunoSync - a bakery owner posting new items, a consultant sharing insights, a retail shop showcasing products. Each person smiles with satisfaction. Growing engagement metrics visible on screens.

scenes.voiceover: Start your free trial today at zunosync.com. Your social media, finally under control.
scenes.visual_description: Bold, clean graphic with ZunoSync logo and brand colors. Person's hand tapping Get Started button on screen. Phone shows notification Your post is live on all platforms. Warm, inspiring background with soft gradient.
